# Junaid Gandhi - Portfolio

I am Junaid Gandhi. I master the entire stack to build scalable web platforms and native mobile ecosystems end-to-end.

## About
Android & Full-Stack Engineer. I don't just write code; I orchestrate systems. Building independently requires rigorous architectural planning across the entire stack. From configuring the underlying database schemas, to deploying scalable Node.js microservices, out to publishing polished native Android endpoints.

## Social Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/iMJ007
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohammed-junaid-gandhi-31555313b/
- Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/dev?id=6428398715878309895&hl=en_IN
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/MohammedJunaidG

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend Frameworks:** Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Motion
- **Backend & APIs:** Node.js, Bun.js, Express, Hono, REST APIs
- **Database & Services:** MongoDB, Firebase Auth, Firestore, Redis
- **Mobile Development:** Native Android, Kotlin, Java, Jetpack Compose
- **Architecture:** API Rate Limiting, Microservice Patterns, Authentication Flows, Data Modeling

## Systems & Projects
- **Unified E-commerce Ecosystem:** A full-scale operation replacing fragmented Shopify instances with a unified, custom architecture.
  - Web Platform: Next.js frontend
  - Core API Backend: Node.js/Express coordinating logic & inventory
  - Android POS: App for retail checkout
  - Admin App: Kotlin/Compose for inventory management

- **Social Wellness Platform:** A community-driven app combining habit tracking with social accountability.
  - Social Graph Server: Bun & Hono optimizing high-frequency relationship queries
  - Consumer Native App: Advanced Android Compose UI
  - Real-time Microservices: WebSocket nodes for live updates

## Mobile Apps Available on Play Store
- Crisper - HD & 4K Wallpapers
- Orphic - Words & Meanings
- EveQuote - Best Inspiring Quotes
